title: Rename native Pi TUI worker internals
goal: Rename internal experimental_pi_tui_worker code paths to native_pi_tui_worker now that the interface is default, while preserving deprecated flag, environment, IPC alias, and preflight compatibility.
acceptance: Internal Rust option and helper names use native_pi_tui_worker instead of experimental_pi_tui_worker where the value means the selected worker interface.
The deprecated --experimental-pi-tui-worker flag and KHAZAD_EXPERIMENTAL_PI_TUI_WORKER environment variable continue to select native TUI rather than failing.
Preflight and resume remain backward-compatible with historical experimental_pi_tui_worker artifacts while treating native_pi_tui_worker as canonical.
